node.excerpt: Since it was announced that DWDD was going to stop, people everywhere have been discussing the programme, sharing lists and drawing…

frontmatter.title: 15 years of the popular Dutch chat show 'DWDD' - in data
frontmatter.description: End of an era: After 15 years, the weekday Dutch chat show 'De Wereld Draait Door' (DWDD) was discontinued in March 2020. DWDD was one of the most popular programmes on Dutch television. Look through the lens of the Media Suite and discover what can be found out about 15 seasons of DWDD (2005-2020) by looking purely at the data.
